title: Automation a Text Message
excerpt:
Apparently we can only integrate texting a team member. What other tools can we connect with to text someone using the phone column? 
Thank you

posts.author: SpinningMyHead (HeadSpinner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apparently we can only integrate texting a team member. What other tools can we connect with to text someone using the phone column?
Thank you

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@SpinningMyHead ,

The Phone Column is primarily designed to store and display phone numbers for team members. However, you can integrate third-party tools and services to enhance communication and texting capabilities.
there are couple of ways you could potentially achieve texting using the Phone Column are Twilio Integration, Zapier Integration etc

hope it is helpful to you,
